headline: Nvidia Makes Trillion-Dollar Forecast at Annual Product Expo
summary: During a 2 1/2-hour keynote address, Huang announced plans to push deeper into central processing units — Intel Corp.’s home turf — and introduced semiconductors made with technology acquired from startup Groq.  The company even said it was developing chips for data centers in outer space.  At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.

content.title: Nvidia Makes Trillion-Dollar Forecast at Annual Product Expo
content.summary: During a 2 1/2-hour keynote address, Huang announced plans to push deeper into central processing units — Intel Corp.’s home turf — and introduced semiconductors made with technology acquired from startup Groq.  The company even said it was developing chips for data centers in outer space.  At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.

headline: Uber shares rise as company partners with Nvidia on robotaxi rollout
summary: Investing.com -- Uber Technologies shares climbed 2% in premarket trading Tuesday after the company announced a partnership with Nvidia to deploy a fleet of robotaxis powered by the AI giant’s autonomous driving software, with launches planned in Los Angeles and San Francisco in 2027.

headline: Toronto Tech Week Announces 2026 Event Calendar, Homecoming Mainstage Returns
summary: TORONTO, March 17, 2026--Toronto Tech Week, a weeklong, citywide tech initiative, will bring back its mainstage event, Homecoming, on May 27, 2026, at a new venue, History. Following a successful debut last year, Toronto Tech Week is expected to welcome more than 15,000 attendees and host more than 300 events across the city during the weeklong celebration.

content.title: Toronto Tech Week Announces 2026 Event Calendar, Homecoming Mainstage Returns
content.summary: TORONTO, March 17, 2026--Toronto Tech Week, a weeklong, citywide tech initiative, will bring back its mainstage event, Homecoming, on May 27, 2026, at a new venue, History. Following a successful debut last year, Toronto Tech Week is expected to welcome more than 15,000 attendees and host more than 300 events across the city during the weeklong celebration.

headline: Tesla’s Biggest Threat Is Nvidia
summary: On Monday, at  Nvidia’s  annual GTC conference, CEO Jensen Huang projected $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand between 2025 and 2027.  It’s an incredible figure that means business for a host of companies, including Nvidia.  The biggest loser in Huang’s scenario, however, might just be  Tesla  with Nvidia’s autonomous driving solutions chipping away at a core part of investors’ reason for owning stock in Elon Musk’s EV maker.

content.title: Tesla’s Biggest Threat Is Nvidia
content.summary: On Monday, at  Nvidia’s  annual GTC conference, CEO Jensen Huang projected $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand between 2025 and 2027.  It’s an incredible figure that means business for a host of companies, including Nvidia.  The biggest loser in Huang’s scenario, however, might just be  Tesla  with Nvidia’s autonomous driving solutions chipping away at a core part of investors’ reason for owning stock in Elon Musk’s EV maker.

headline: Uber to invest $500 million in Argentina over 3 years, economy minister says
summary: March 17 () - Ride-hailing application ‌Uber will ‌invest $500 million in ​Argentina over the next three years, ‌Economy ⁠Minister Luis Caputo said ⁠on Tuesday. Caputo made the ​announcement ​in ​a post ‌on X after holding a meeting, which he described ‌as "excellent," ​with ​Uber ​CEO Dara ‌Khosrowshahi and ​Argentina ​country manager Eli Frias.

headline: Uber And NVIDIA Expand Robotaxis As Uber Stock Appears Undervalued
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) and NVIDIA have agreed to deploy large-scale Level 4 autonomous vehicles across 28 cities globally. The partnership focuses on a fully NVIDIA software-driven robotaxi fleet, using the new NVIDIA Alpamayo AI stack. A phased rollout, including city-specific AI training, targets a global deployment by 2028 as part of Uber's multi-operator robotaxi strategy. Uber Technologies, trading at $74.66, sits at the center of the ride hailing shift toward software defined...

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Nvidia, Oklo, Delta, Uber, Honeywell, Elbit, and More
summary: Stock futures were rising Tuesday, extending gains from Monday.  CEO Jensen Huang said at the event that Nvidia expects to sell at least $1 trillion worth of Blackwell and Rubin chips from 2025 through to the end of 2027.  The ride-hailing company and Nvidia expanded their partnership on self-driving vehicles, with Uber pledging to launch an expansive fleet of robo-taxis enabled by Nvidia’s DRIVE platform by 2028.

CEO Jensen Huang said at the event that Nvidia expects to sell at least $1 trillion worth of Blackwell and Rubin chips from 2025 through to the end of 2027.  The ride-hailing company and Nvidia expanded their partnership on self-driving vehicles, with Uber pledging to launch an expansive fleet of robo-taxis enabled by Nvidia’s DRIVE platform by 2028.

headline: NVIDIA Extends AI Factories Vision With GTC 2026 Agentic And Physical AI
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) used GTC 2026 to launch a broad agentic AI and physical AI platform spanning data center to edge. The company introduced the Vera CPU, Rubin GPU, DSX architecture, and the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform aimed at large scale AI factories. New partnerships include Uber for Level 4 robotaxis targeted for 2027 deployment in 28 cities, plus HPE’s AI Grid and expanded DRIVE Hyperion adoption. NVIDIA unveiled NemoClaw, OpenShell, Nemotron open models, and a physical AI data...
